name: Protagonist
description: Serious art-deco Rapture citizen. Side view, teal overcoat.

scale.notes: Authoritative height usually comes from room.manH_scene when placed in a room.

rules: Generate idle on pure green #00FF00, full body side view facing right.
Walk cycle must be derived from the idle plate for identity.
Never draw full-opacity idle under walk frames.
Use idle aspect for stable on-screen width; fit walk frames to same height.
Accel/decel movement; pause walk video soft on stop (no hard seek pop).
Composite with room props before shipping scale.
